candidates.text: @flydotio this is not resolved. my machines do not boot

It’s been over 10 hours and our deployments are still failing, causing major issues for us. We’ve tried changing the deployment region, but it’s not working. Please look into this and resolve it ASAP. @vercel @rauchg

I regret moving away from Vercel

Sure using a VPS and Coolify is cool 😎

But the number of hours lost to debugging, securing, random crashes, broken connections, docker issues, is absurd

Just not worth it

when supabase was banned in india i successfully self-hosted and migrated all data to the supabase on coolify.

eveything was broken ootb, social auth doesn't exist, project settings will crash your website. it was a bloodbath. 

you'll have to debug on your own, downgrade stuff to stable versions, manage dns/ssl/domains etc.

honestly, if there is any takeaways from this it's don't use supabase anymore. use pocketbase or convex for side project backends
